reviews.title: The view is in a good location.
reviews.text:
The view and the location of the accommodation are top-notch. The breakfast menu was the same during the four-night stay. The lunch and dinner options and the variety of wines are not extensive. The shower in the accommodation is old and has weak water pressure. The soundproofing is also fairly decent. 

What stands out the most is that you can see the sunrise. The view is very good.

reviews.title: The room was too hot, the water was too cold, but the staff were nice.
reviews.positives: The staff was friendly
reviews.negatives: The room was incredibly warm and we could not get it down to a reasonable temperature. It was 29 degrees Celsius (84 farenheit) and even opening the window and using a fan we could not get it below 26 Celsius. It was uncomfortably warm to try and sleep here. We asked the staff about the heat and they suggested opening a window and provided a fan, neither really worked. In addition to this, the hot water in the bathroom never got really above tepid. The room was too hot and the water was too cold. These are discomforts we weren't really expecting in a hotel of this price and caliber.

reviews.title: We would choose it again
reviews.positives:
We had a room with two beds on the 16th floor with lake view. The beds were very comfortable. There was no noise from other rooms, the hall, or from outside. A special feature is the wall of the bathroom towards the front of the room: it is made of glass. But don't worry: there is a switch in the bathroom to turn the glass opaque!
During our three weeks in South Korea we stayed at 8 different hotels. This one is among those we liked most. Breakfast offered the largest selection of foods of all the 8 hotels, however, also at the highest price. There is also a buffet dinner, but we did not test it because of the high price.
We liked the free parking in the underground garage.
reviews.negatives: We would have appreciated a second luggage rack.

It was cozy, but the taste was also satisfying.

reviews.title: Nice clean new hotel in a gorgeous new city ready to explore
reviews.positives: We loved this hotel and specifically we actually were surprised at Sejong itself, a newer town but oh so beautiful and everything around the hotel was beautiful. In fact I was disappointed we were only staying one night as there was so much we could do here. DO NOT miss the Guemgang Bridge. Its an epic visit. Give yourself a couple of hours to walk the loop. Hotel was clean and very comfortable. Thankfully the clear glass for the bathroom magics itself into frosted, my kids were not impressed with this at first.
reviews.negatives: The price for the breakfast is very steep. In fact the prices for breakfast at most hotels in Korea is ridiculously high for what you get. I did prepay for meals and understood everyone in a room was covered, but at the last minute the hotel were telling us it didn't include the child. So after we had eaten they are telling us to pay that. In the moment I had nothing to verify what they were saying was true or not. I would say those breakfasts are probably OK for Koreans, they seemed to load up their plates. For a western palate it was OK but not the best. Everything is very spread out so you have to go on an adventure to find everything you need. We did get some help from another western couple who was there, who had also had to figure it out. We had difficulty getting seated too, I don't think the host understood that we were a group of 5, she seated 3 of us then squeezed in a 4th but there was no space for the 5th. When you pay a lot of money for breakfast, like boardering on $250 for 5 people (worse than a disney meal!!!) I think you deserve some kind of better service than we got. Hotel room is pricey for what it is, but it was the most comfortable of all our hotels in Korea so we tend to overlook the extravagant cost for a basic room. Parking is decent, underground and best of all - free.

reviews.title: I rested comfortably.
reviews.text: I looked into Buyeo for my trip to Gongju, but all reservations were full, so I ended up booking in Sejong instead. It's a bit further from the travel destination, but it was cost-effective. There was also a nearby park, making it nice for a walk.

reviews.title: Hôtel moderne international proche du lac et de l'arboretum
reviews.positives:
Hôtel international proche du lac et de l'arboretum, seules attractions touristiques à Sejong.
Pratique d'avoir un GS25 et 7/11 au pied de l'immeuble, ainsi que quelques cafés proches.
Chambres agréables, un peu petites mais bien pensées
Repas possibles jusqu'à 22h30 et en room service
reviews.negatives:
Je n'ai pas testé le petit déjeuner disponible uniquement sous forme de buffet à 38 000 par personne. Dans la chambre, tout le nécessaire est disponible pour prendre un café, un thé (bouilloire, filtre à eau, frigo) et on peut acheter de quoi grignoter dans les supérettes alentour.

reviews.title: It was a pleasant trip.
reviews.text:
It has been a long time since we went on a family trip with my parents. Since we decided on it suddenly and it was a golden holiday, there weren't many travel destinations available, so we also thought about Cheongju, which is not far from Sejong, and ended up visiting the Courtyard Marriott.

All of my family, including me, prioritized cleanliness when making hotel reservations, and the place was really clean, probably because it hasn't been open for long. It seemed like the housekeeping ladies took great care in maintaining it.

Since we were staying for multiple nights, we requested that they didn't need to clean the room but just to refill the coffee and water, which they kindly agreed to. When we came back, I felt so sorry and grateful to the housekeeping lady who had cleaned up everything neatly. My parents were really impressed.

Of course, there were some disappointments. We had booked a lake view room expecting a wide view of the lake, but it was quite far away, which was a letdown. Upon entering the hotel lobby, I noticed a sour sauce-like smell, and I didn't think the buffet should have been on the same floor. The fridge… was really not cool at all, so I hope they can replace it with a better one.

Despite the disappointments, the accommodation was very clean, and the friendly staff made our stay enjoyable. Thank you for creating good memories for us.

reviews.positives: 스위트룸에 2박 했습니다. 룸 컨디션은 비교적 좋았습니다만, 묶는 동안 윗층 소음이 매우 거슬렸습니다. 잠을 잘 수 없을정도의 층간소음이었습니다.
reviews.negatives: 유명 관광지가 있는 도시가 아니어서 조용하고 편안한 휴식을 위해 2박 일정으로 스위트룸에 투숙하였으나, 전혀 편안하게 쉬지 못했다. 특히 조식 레스토랑은 소리지르는 아이들 천지였으며, 스탭들은 전혀 관리하지 않는 모습에서 여기가 관광지 리조트가 아닌가 착각할정도였다. 조용한 휴식을 원하는 손님보다는 어린아이를 동반한 가족단위 손님에게 적합한 호텔이다. 주차장도 이중주차를 해놓아서 출차까지도 너무 불편했다.

reviews.title: A great location for traveling in Sejong City.
reviews.text: I visited for a training trip. It was nice that the lake park, Sejong Botanical Garden, and the restaurant area were close by. The room condition was good, very good. Compared to other hotels, the room and bathroom were a bit spacious. It seems they focused more on the quality of the food rather than the variety for breakfast, and I liked it. They automatically served coffee based on the number of people at the table. The parking lot was spacious, making parking convenient, and the lobby was pleasant. I accidentally reserved a double bed, but they upgraded me to a twin. One thing to note is that all the lake views are twin, and all the city views are city views, so please keep that in mind when making a reservation.

reviews.title: It was nice because it was clean, but the check-in was unpleasant due to the pricing policy.
reviews.text: The location was good and the place was clean, which I liked. However, there were additional charges for extra guests at check-in. I had seen in the notice and reservation confirmation email that there could be charges for extra guests, but when I searched on Agoda, I already searched for 3 people, and rooms for 3 were available for booking and payment. However, when I arrived, only the charge for 2 people was processed, and I was told that I needed to pay for 1 additional guest, which left me astonished and upset. The reception staff are not at fault, but the customers' complaints have to be endured by them in this situation... It's tough for the staff and unpleasant for the guests... I hope there could be a clear indication to prevent this kind of discomfort from the start.

I had a great rest for a day.

reviews.title: A thankful accommodation that I got to know thanks to the Hangul Run Marathon.
reviews.text: The price was very expensive, but I understood after seeing the condition of the accommodation. There was no carpet, so there was no musty smell when I opened the door. 👍🏻 If you look closely at the floor, there were many places with dust or hair, but it was so clean that I was happy. 👍🏻 The bathroom being transparent was a bit surprising, but it was a relief that it became opaque when I turned off the switch. I used the room with my mom and sister, and we were very satisfied. 👍🏻👍🏻 Next time, I want to try the breakfast as well. This is the first time I've been to Sejong because of the Hangul class, and thanks to this hotel, I'm leaving with a good impression!

reviews.title: 4성급 호텔다움
reviews.positives: 세종호수와 도심 뷰 둘 모두 방이 좋습니다. 침대, 가구, 방 구성, 침대에서 바라다보이는 화장실 내부가 화장실의 깜짝 버튼(!)으로 시선 차단되는 게 신기했습니다. 화장실 안 그림과 어메니티 색상까지 전체적인 것을 고려해 맞추신 듯 했습니다. 세심한 배려에 감사드립니다.
reviews.negatives: 직접 응대해주신 직원분은 훌륭하셨지만, 다른 직원 한 분의 응대는 실망스러웠습니다. 겉모습을 보고 다르게 대하시는 것 같았습니다.

reviews.title: The hotel I stay at every time I go to Sejong.
reviews.text: This is a place we always go to when we take the kids on a 1-night, 2-day trip to Sejong. The accessibility to play at Sejong Central Park is very good, and after staying one night, it's nice to play in the sandbox at the playground across the river. It's clean, and the breakfast is decent.
reviews.response: 안녕하세요 고객님! 저희 코트야드 바이 메리어트 세종을 방문해주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 고객님의 칭찬과 격려의 말씀은 전 직원과 공유하여 앞으로도 지속적인 서비스 품질 향상의 기회로 삼겠습니다. 저희 호텔에서 보내신 소중한 시간을 공유 해주셔서 정말 감사드리며, 항상 준비 된 모습으로 고객님께 멋진 경험을 선물 해 드릴 수 있는 날을 고대하고 있겠습니다. 고객님께 늘 건강과 행복이 가득하기를 기원합니다. Courtyard by Marriott Sejong 올림

reviews.title: I had a really good rest.
reviews.text: My friends came to Sejong to visit and stayed over. They upgraded our room at a great price, and it was nice that we could have snacks and coffee in the 20th-floor lounge. I especially liked the 24-hour gym equipment, and we could take a walk in the lake park that feels like a front yard. The arboretum is nearby, and there are good restaurants within a 15-minute drive. The Geumgang Walking Bridge is close, so the location is amazing.

reviews.title: Perfect accommodation and service
reviews.text: I usually don't leave hotel reviews because it's a hassle. However, I have to make an exception for this place. I stayed for one night on December 6th, 2024. My wife and I had a trip to Sejong during her 30th week of pregnancy, so we chose to stay at Courtyard Sejong because of the great reviews and price. On the evening of check-in, around 10 PM, we made a rather difficult request to the hotel without any fault on their part, but the staff was kind and professional, trying to resolve the issue from start to finish. I am very grateful for that. Thanks to them, my pregnant wife was able to enjoy a happy trip. The hotel's hygiene was excellent, to say the least. If we come to Sejong again, we will definitely stay here. Special thanks to the male and female front desk staff who worked the night shift on December 6th to 7th.

If I have the chance to come near Daejeon again, I will definitely consider this place.

reviews.positives:

reviews.title: Nice hotel with room for improvement
reviews.positives: The hotel features large, well-thought-out rooms and spacious, well-equipped bathrooms. Because it’s a large property, having plenty of elevators makes getting to the higher floors quick and easy. Breakfast was good, using high-quality ingredients. Additionally, the staff is welcoming and most speak good English.
reviews.negatives: On the downside, the hotel lacks a pool or sauna, which you would expect at this price point. In the restaurant, some staff members do not speak English and struggled to properly serve guests - for a hotel of this caliber, the hiring and training standards should be higher. There was also a maintenance issue in the bathroom, as water constantly leaked onto the floor during showers, likely due to a poor silicone seal. Finally, checkout was a frustrating experience, we had to explain four times that we needed a company receipt, as the front desk staff seemed completely unfamiliar with how to issue one.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice room. Big incredibly comfy bed, good shower with a lot of space, and a well kitted bathroom. Room is nicely lit with good options to adjust the lighting, TV not world-beating but high-res and a good size, has youtube and netflix - but you need your own account. The hotel is very clean and kept to an impressive standard. There is a cafe, bar/lounge and restaurant within the hotel. An extensive room service menu of korean and western style food is avaliable for in room dining too. I only dined in my room but it was easy, the staff were polite, and the food was real tasty. To top things off - at least from my room on the 15th floor - the view from the whole-wall window was tremendous. I had city view but the lake view was even better!
reviews.negatives: Although very pleasant it is not the cheapest, this also applies to the food which again was very nice but considering how inexpensive it generally is to eat out in south korea, wasn't exceptional value. Far from overpriced though. The laundry service is per-item and quite expensive so be aware if you are planning to use that.
